message:
fix: Place asyncify buffer at end of memory to prevent heap corruption

CPython's sbrk heap allocator grows sequentially from __heap_base. When
the asyncify data buffer was placed at the start of the grown memory
region (origSize), sbrk would overwrite it during _start() execution,
corrupting saved stack state and preventing rewind from completing.

Move the buffer to the END of memory (totalSize - ASYNCIFY_DATA_SIZE)
so the heap allocator must exhaust all memory before reaching it.
